'''hazate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hindward|hindward]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-z-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hindward|hindward]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| hazate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:hazate|hazate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hazatesher|hazatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hazatesherĂ«m|hazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hazatero|hazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hazateshĂ«|hazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hazateshĂ«m|hazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihazatero|gokihazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihazateshĂ«|gokihazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihazateshĂ«m|gokihazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohazankerom|gohazankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohazankeshĂ«|gohazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohazankeshĂ«m|gohazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohazankeya|gohazankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hazaterom|hazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hazatemu|hazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hazateya|hazateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihazaterom|gokihazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihazatemu|gokihazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihazateya|gokihazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:hazazate|hazazate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hazazatesher|hazazatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hazazatesherĂ«m|hazazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hazazatero|hazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hazazateshĂ«|hazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hazazateshĂ«m|hazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihazazatero|gokihazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihazazateshĂ«|gokihazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihazazateshĂ«m|gokihazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohazazankerom|gohazazankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohazazankeshĂ«|gohazazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohazazankeshĂ«m|gohazazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohazazankeya|gohazazankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hazazaterom|hazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hazazatemu|hazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hazazateya|hazazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihazazaterom|gokihazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihazazatemu|gokihazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihazazateya|gokihazazateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:hĂŠzĂŠte|hĂŠzĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hĂŠzĂŠtesher|hĂŠzĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m|hĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hĂŠzĂŠtero|hĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|hĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|hĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihĂŠzĂŠtero|gokihĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|gokihĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|gokihĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohĂŠzĂŠnkerom|gohĂŠzĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«|gohĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gohĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohĂŠzĂŠnkeya|gohĂŠzĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hĂŠzĂŠterom|hĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠzĂŠtemu|hĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hĂŠzĂŠteya|hĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihĂŠzĂŠterom|gokihĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihĂŠzĂŠtemu|gokihĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihĂŠzĂŠteya|gokihĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:hafzafte|hafzafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hafzaftesher|hafzaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafzaftesherĂ«m|hafzaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hafzaftero|hafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hafzafteshĂ«|hafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafzafteshĂ«m|hafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihafzaftero|gokihafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihafzafteshĂ«|gokihafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihafzafteshĂ«m|gokihafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohafzafnkerom|gohafzafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohafzafnkeshĂ«|gohafzafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohafzafnkeshĂ«m|gohafzafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohafzafnkeya|gohafzafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hafzafterom|hafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafzaftemu|hafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hafzafteya|hafzafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihafzafterom|gokihafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihafzaftemu|gokihafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihafzafteya|gokihafzafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
